dsl_rule.translation_notes: Dark Cloud Cover pattern translated as: (1) Current close below previous high (cloud cover), (2) Current high below previous high (lower peak), (3) Current low below previous low (lower valley), (4) Price below 200-day SMA (longer-term downtrend). Exit when price recovers above 20-day SMA. Pattern is most reliable in downtrends; avoid in sustained uptrends. Success rate and volume parameters marked AUTHOR_SILENT in source were excluded as untranslatable without specific values.

source_rule_text: Dark Cloud Cover: A bearish reversal pattern appearing at the peak of an upward move, characterized by lower peaks and lower valleys signaling a downward price trend. Most profitable when the longer-term price trend is downward despite a few days of upward price action leading to the pattern.
